tuning: E A D G B E
content:
CHORUS:

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G#[/ch]
I'm not afraid to take a stand[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]
Everybody come take my hand[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C[/ch]
We'll walk this road together, through the storm[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G#[/ch]
Whatever weather, cold or warm[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Eb[/ch]
Just let you know that, you're not alone[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bb[/ch]                                               [ch]C[/ch]
Holla if you feel that you've been down the same road[/tab]

VERSE:
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
You can try and read my lyrics off of this paper before I lay 'em[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]
But you won't take this thing out these words before I say 'em[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]
Cause ain't no way I'm let you stop me from causing mayhem[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
When I say 'em or do something I do it, I don't give a damn[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
What you think, I'm doing this for me, so fuck the world[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G#[/ch]
Feed it beans, it's gassed up, if a thing's stopping me[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Eb[/ch]
I'mma be what I set out to be, without a doubt undoubtedly[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
And all those who look down on me I'm tearing down your balcony[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
No if ands or buts don't try to ask him why or how can he[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]                                                         [ch]Eb[/ch]
From Infinite down to the last Relapse album he's still shit'n[/tab]

Whether he's on salary, paid hourly
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
Until he bows out or he shit's his bowels out of him[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Whichever comes first, for better or worse[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G#[/ch]
He's married to the game, like a fuck you for christmas[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Eb[/ch]
His gift is a curse, forget the earth he's got the urge[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Bb[/ch]
To pull his dick from the dirt and fuck the universe[/tab]

CHORUS

VERSE

CHORUS

BRIDGE:
[tab]                        [ch]G#[/ch]
And I just can't keep living this way[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Eb[/ch]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
So starting today, I'm breaking out of this cage[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
I'm standing up, Imma face my demons[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G#[/ch]
I'm manning up, Imma hold my ground[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Eb[/ch]
I've had enough, now I'm so fed up[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
Time to put my life back together right now[/tab]

VERSE

CHORUS

END

[tab]- I hope you find this helpful. This is what sounds correct to my ear. If you have any
